summary: Tested 9xCodes Seeder feature and homepage newsletter CTA removal. All 16 backend API tests passed. Frontend seeder page working correctly with Category/OS selection, Preview, Seed Selected, and session history. Homepage newsletter CTA successfully removed, footer newsletter form retained.

backend.seeder_categories_endpoint: PASS - GET /api/seeder/categories returns 14 categories and 8 OS options
backend.seeder_preview_installation_ubuntu: PASS - POST /api/seeder/preview returns article previews with exists/new status
backend.seeder_preview_installation_centos: PASS - Preview shows correct article structure (title, category, difficulty, os, tags, exists)
backend.seeder_preview_networking_fedora: PASS - Preview shows existing articles as exists=true
backend.seeder_preview_default_os: PASS - Defaults to Ubuntu when OS not specified
backend.seeder_preview_exists_badge: PASS - Preview shows exists=true for already seeded articles
backend.seeder_seed_verify_persistence: PASS - Seeded articles persisted in database

frontend.homepage_no_newsletter_cta: PASS - Homepage does NOT have 'Stay Updated' newsletter CTA section (removed as expected)
frontend.homepage_popular_articles: PASS - Popular Articles section still present on homepage
frontend.footer_newsletter_form: PASS - Footer still has newsletter form with email input and subscribe button
frontend.admin_panel_seeder_card: PASS - Admin Panel has Seeder card with green Sprout icon linking to /admin/seeder
frontend.seeder_page_loads: PASS - Article Seeder page loads with title and description
frontend.seeder_category_dropdown: PASS - Category dropdown present with 14 categories
frontend.seeder_os_dropdown: PASS - OS dropdown present with 8 OS options, defaults to Ubuntu
frontend.seeder_preview_button: PASS - Preview button present and clickable when category selected
frontend.seeder_seed_all_button: PASS - Seed ALL Categories button present
frontend.seeder_preview_results: PASS - Preview shows article list with New/Exists badges
frontend.seeder_seed_creates_articles: PASS - Seed Selected creates articles, shows toast 'Seeded! 2 articles added, 0 skipped'
frontend.seeder_seed_history: PASS - Seed History shows session seed operations with timestamp, category, OS, and count

seed_data_creation: Test articles seeded during testing: Database/macOS (2 articles), Networking/Fedora (2 articles), Security/macOS, Backup/Windows, Monitoring/RHEL
context_for_next_testing_agent: Seeder feature fully tested and working. Seeder APIs: GET /api/seeder/categories (14 categories, 8 OS), POST /api/seeder/preview (preview articles with exists status), POST /api/seeder/seed (seed articles, skips duplicates). Frontend: /admin/seeder page with Category dropdown (data-testid='seeder-category-select'), OS dropdown (data-testid='seeder-os-select'), Preview button (data-testid='preview-btn'), Seed Selected button (data-testid='seed-btn'), Seed ALL Categories button (data-testid='seed-all-btn'). Preview shows articles with New/Exists badges. Seed History tracks session operations. Homepage newsletter CTA removed, footer newsletter retained.
